description: An aerodynamicist needs to run a Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulation to analyze airflow over a new winglet design.

nodes.task_description: Create a mesh (a grid of points) around the 3D model of the winglet for the simulation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a high-quality mesh suitable for CFD.

nodes.task_description: Set up the simulation conditions, including airspeed, altitude (air density), and turbulence model.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly defines all simulation parameters.

nodes.task_description: Run the CFD simulation and analyze the results to determine the winglet's effectiveness at reducing induced drag.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs the simulation and the results show a 4% reduction in drag.
